ddls:
CREATE TABLE "network_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "creation_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were recorded */,
  "authenticate_count" REAL /* Count of user authentications within the specified period */,
  "active_count" REAL /* Count of active user sessions */,
  "disconnect_count" REAL /* Count of user disconnections */,
  "cpu_util" REAL /* Percentage of CPU utilization */,
  "memory_used" REAL /* Amount of memory used in GB */,
  "memory_free" REAL /* Amount of free memory in GB */,
  "temp_min" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded in Celsius */,
  "temp_max" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded in Celsius */,
  "temp_avg" REAL /* Average temperature recorded in Celsius */,
  "in_bandwidth" REAL /* Incoming bandwidth in Mbps */,
  "out_bandwidth" REAL /* Outgoing bandwidth in Mbps */,
  "in_total_pps" REAL /* Incoming packets per second (PPS) */,
  "out_total_pps" REAL /* Outgoing packets per second (PPS) */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the node that the metrics belong to */,
  "data_transfer_type" TEXT /* Type of data transfer (e.g., video, audio, file) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_metrics_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES network_nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., network admin, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., active, disconnected) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "bytes_transferred" INTEGER /* Total bytes transferred during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related metric entry */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., threshold exceeded) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message providing detail about the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., critical, warning, info) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES network_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data contained within the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network node */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the node */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the node (e.g., online, offline) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the node */,
  "last_update_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role that the permission applies to */,
  "metric_access" TEXT /* Type of access to metrics (e.g., read, write, none) */,
  "report_access" TEXT /* Type of access to reports (e.g., read, write, none) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_node_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the node */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node that was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_node_access_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES network_nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_node_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
